concepts.label: Food
concepts.definition: Any substance consumed to provide nutritional support for an organism

concepts.label: Drink
concepts.definition: A liquid that can be consumed by humans for nutrition or pleasure

concepts.label: Nutrition
concepts.definition: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth

concepts.label: Vitamin
concepts.definition: Organic compounds required by an organism as vital nutrients in limited amounts

concepts.label: Mineral
concepts.definition: Chemical elements required by living organisms for proper functioning

concepts.label: Carbohydrate
concepts.definition: Biomolecules consisting of carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen atoms that provide energy

concepts.label: Protein
concepts.definition: Large biomolecules consisting of amino acids that are essential for body functions

concepts.label: Fat
concepts.definition: Lipid molecules that provide energy and support cell functions

concepts.label: Fiber
concepts.definition: Indigestible portion of plant foods that aids in digestion

concepts.label: Calorie
concepts.definition: Unit of energy content in food and drinks

concepts.label: Apple
concepts.definition: Sweet, edible fruit produced by apple trees, rich in fiber and vitamins

concepts.label: Banana
concepts.definition: Yellow curved fruit high in potassium and natural sugars

concepts.label: Orange
concepts.definition: Citrus fruit rich in vitamin C with sweet-tart flavor

concepts.label: Strawberry
concepts.definition: Red berry with seeds on outside, sweet flavor and high vitamin C

concepts.label: Cherry
concepts.definition: Small stone fruit that can be sweet or tart, rich in antioxidants

concepts.label: Grape
concepts.definition: Small round fruit growing in clusters, used fresh or for wine

concepts.label: Lemon
concepts.definition: Yellow citrus fruit with sour taste, very high in vitamin C

concepts.label: Watermelon
concepts.definition: Large fruit with green rind and red flesh, high water content

concepts.label: Pear
concepts.definition: Sweet fruit with soft texture and mild flavor when ripe

concepts.label: Peach
concepts.definition: Fuzzy stone fruit with sweet, juicy flesh and orange-pink skin

concepts.label: Pineapple
concepts.definition: Tropical fruit with spiky exterior and sweet, tangy flesh

concepts.label: Mango
concepts.definition: Tropical stone fruit with sweet, aromatic flesh rich in vitamins

concepts.label: Kiwi
concepts.definition: Small brown fuzzy fruit with green flesh and tiny black seeds

concepts.label: Raspberry
concepts.definition: Small red aggregate berry with sweet-tart flavor and antioxidants

concepts.label: Blueberry
concepts.definition: Small blue berry packed with antioxidants and vitamin C

concepts.label: Avocado
concepts.definition: Green fruit with creamy flesh, high in healthy fats

concepts.label: Coconut
concepts.definition: Large brown seed with white meat and coconut water inside

concepts.label: Papaya
concepts.definition: Tropical fruit with orange flesh and black seeds, rich in enzymes

concepts.label: Cantaloupe
concepts.definition: Orange-fleshed melon with sweet taste and high water content

concepts.label: Honeydew
concepts.definition: Green-fleshed melon with sweet mild flavor

concepts.label: Potato
concepts.definition: Starchy tuber vegetable that is a staple food in many cultures

concepts.label: Tomato
concepts.definition: Red fruit botanically, used as vegetable in cooking, rich in lycopene

concepts.label: Cucumber
concepts.definition: Green cylindrical vegetable with high water content and mild flavor

concepts.label: Carrot
concepts.definition: Orange root vegetable high in beta-carotene and vitamin A

concepts.label: Onion
concepts.definition: Bulb vegetable with sharp flavor, used as base in many dishes

concepts.label: Garlic
concepts.definition: Pungent bulb used as seasoning, known for health benefits

concepts.label: Bell Pepper
concepts.definition: Sweet pepper in various colors, rich in vitamin C

concepts.label: Broccoli
concepts.definition: Green flowering vegetable high in vitamins and fiber

concepts.label: Spinach
concepts.definition: Dark leafy green vegetable high in iron and folate

concepts.label: Lettuce
concepts.definition: Leafy green vegetable commonly used in salads

concepts.label: Green Beans
concepts.definition: Long thin green pods containing beans, eaten whole

concepts.label: Peas
concepts.definition: Small round green seeds eaten fresh or dried

concepts.label: Corn
concepts.definition: Yellow kernels on cob, starchy grain used as vegetable

concepts.label: Pumpkin
concepts.definition: Large orange squash used for cooking and decoration

concepts.label: Zucchini
concepts.definition: Green summer squash with mild flavor and soft texture

concepts.label: Celery
concepts.definition: Crunchy green stalks often eaten raw or used in cooking

concepts.label: Cauliflower
concepts.definition: White flowering vegetable similar to broccoli

concepts.label: Cabbage
concepts.definition: Leafy vegetable with dense round head

concepts.label: Radish
concepts.definition: Small red or white root vegetable with peppery flavor

concepts.label: Beet
concepts.definition: Deep red root vegetable with earthy flavor

concepts.label: Wheat
concepts.definition: Cereal grain used to make flour for bread and pasta

concepts.label: Rice
concepts.definition: Small white or brown grains that are a staple food worldwide

concepts.label: Oats
concepts.definition: Whole grain cereal commonly eaten as oatmeal for breakfast

concepts.label: Rye
concepts.definition: Dark grain used for bread and whiskey production

concepts.label: Barley
concepts.definition: Grain used in soups, beer production, and animal feed

concepts.label: Bread
concepts.definition: Staple food made from flour, water and yeast, baked in an oven

concepts.label: Pasta
concepts.definition: Food made from wheat flour and water, formed into various shapes

concepts.label: Flour
concepts.definition: Powder made by grinding grains, used for baking and cooking

concepts.label: Sugar
concepts.definition: Sweet crystalline substance derived from sugar cane or beet

concepts.label: Salt
concepts.definition: White crystalline substance used for seasoning and preservation

concepts.label: Oil
concepts.definition: Liquid fat used for cooking, frying, and food preparation

concepts.label: Vinegar
concepts.definition: Acidic liquid used for cooking, seasoning, and preservation

concepts.label: Butter
concepts.definition: Dairy product made by churning cream, used for cooking and spreading

concepts.label: Cheese
concepts.definition: Dairy product made by coagulating milk and aging

concepts.label: Milk
concepts.definition: White liquid produced by mammals, rich in calcium and protein

concepts.label: Yogurt
concepts.definition: Fermented dairy product with probiotics and protein

concepts.label: Egg
concepts.definition: Oval reproductive body laid by birds, commonly chicken, high in protein

concepts.label: Quinoa
concepts.definition: Seed treated as grain, complete protein with all amino acids

concepts.label: Cereal
concepts.definition: Breakfast food made from processed grains, often eaten with milk

concepts.label: Beef
concepts.definition: Meat from cattle, high in protein and iron

concepts.label: Pork
concepts.definition: Meat from pigs, versatile protein source

concepts.label: Chicken
concepts.definition: White meat from poultry, lean protein source

concepts.label: Lamb
concepts.definition: Meat from young sheep, tender with distinctive flavor

concepts.label: Salmon
concepts.definition: Pink fish rich in omega-3 fatty acids and protein

concepts.label: Tuna
concepts.definition: Large ocean fish with lean meat, high in protein

concepts.label: Shrimp
concepts.definition: Small shellfish with sweet flavor and lean protein

concepts.label: Sausage
concepts.definition: Processed meat product typically made from ground meat in casing

concepts.label: Ham
concepts.definition: Preserved leg meat from pig, often smoked or cured

concepts.label: Turkey
concepts.definition: Large poultry bird, lean white meat high in protein

concepts.label: Duck
concepts.definition: Waterfowl with rich, fatty meat and distinctive flavor

concepts.label: Cod
concepts.definition: White ocean fish with mild flavor and flaky texture

concepts.label: Crab
concepts.definition: Shellfish with sweet meat in hard shell

concepts.label: Lobster
concepts.definition: Large marine crustacean considered a delicacy

concepts.label: Bacon
concepts.definition: Cured and smoked pork belly with high fat content

concepts.label: Water
concepts.definition: Essential liquid for all life, H2O molecule with no calories

concepts.label: Juice
concepts.definition: Liquid extracted from fruits or vegetables, contains natural sugars

concepts.label: Tea
concepts.definition: Hot beverage made by steeping tea leaves in hot water

concepts.label: Coffee
concepts.definition: Hot beverage made from roasted coffee beans, contains caffeine

concepts.label: Soda
concepts.definition: Carbonated soft drink typically sweetened and flavored

concepts.label: Beer
concepts.definition: Alcoholic beverage made from fermented grains, usually barley

concepts.label: Wine
concepts.definition: Alcoholic beverage made from fermented grapes

concepts.label: Cola
concepts.definition: Dark carbonated soft drink with caffeine and sweet flavor

concepts.label: Smoothie
concepts.definition: Blended drink made from fruits, vegetables, and liquid base

concepts.label: Sports Drink
concepts.definition: Beverage designed to replenish electrolytes during exercise

concepts.label: Energy Drink
concepts.definition: Caffeinated beverage designed to provide mental and physical stimulation

concepts.label: Hot Chocolate
concepts.definition: Warm drink made from chocolate and milk or water

concepts.label: Lemonade
concepts.definition: Sweet drink made from lemon juice, water, and sugar

concepts.label: Green Tea
concepts.definition: Light tea made from unfermented leaves, high in antioxidants

concepts.label: Black Tea
concepts.definition: Strong tea made from fully fermented leaves

concepts.label: Human Body
concepts.definition: Physical structure of a human being composed of organ systems

concepts.label: Head
concepts.definition: Upper part of human body containing brain, eyes, ears, nose, and mouth

concepts.label: Arm
concepts.definition: Upper limb extending from shoulder to hand

concepts.label: Leg
concepts.definition: Lower limb extending from hip to foot

concepts.label: Hand
concepts.definition: End part of arm with fingers and thumb for grasping

concepts.label: Foot
concepts.definition: End part of leg used for standing and walking

concepts.label: Finger
concepts.definition: Digit of hand used for fine motor control and grasping

concepts.label: Toe
concepts.definition: Digit of foot used for balance and walking

concepts.label: Eye
concepts.definition: Organ of sight that detects light and converts it to nerve signals

concepts.label: Ear
concepts.definition: Organ of hearing and balance that detects sound waves

concepts.label: Nose
concepts.definition: Organ of smell and part of respiratory system

concepts.label: Mouth
concepts.definition: Opening for eating, drinking, breathing, and speaking

concepts.label: Tongue
concepts.definition: Muscular organ for taste, speaking, and moving food

concepts.label: Tooth
concepts.definition: Hard structure in mouth used for biting and chewing food

concepts.label: Hair
concepts.definition: Thread-like structures growing from follicles on human skin

concepts.label: Skin
concepts.definition: Outer covering of human body providing protection and sensation

concepts.label: Heart
concepts.definition: Muscular organ that pumps blood throughout the body

concepts.label: Lung
concepts.definition: Respiratory organ that exchanges oxygen and carbon dioxide

concepts.label: Stomach
concepts.definition: Digestive organ that breaks down food with acid

concepts.label: Brain
concepts.definition: Central organ of nervous system controlling body functions and thought

concepts.label: Bone
concepts.definition: Hard tissue that forms skeletal framework of body

concepts.label: Muscle
concepts.definition: Tissue that contracts to produce movement

concepts.label: Blood
concepts.definition: Red liquid that carries oxygen and nutrients throughout body

concepts.label: Nerve
concepts.definition: Bundle of fibers that transmit electrical signals in body

concepts.label: Liver
concepts.definition: Large organ that detoxifies blood and produces bile

concepts.label: Kidney
concepts.definition: Organ that filters waste from blood and produces urine

concepts.label: Intestine
concepts.definition: Long tube where food digestion and nutrient absorption occur

concepts.label: Spine
concepts.definition: Column of vertebrae that protects spinal cord

concepts.label: Shoulder
concepts.definition: Joint where arm connects to torso

concepts.label: Knee
concepts.definition: Joint in middle of leg that allows bending

concepts.label: Elbow
concepts.definition: Joint in middle of arm that allows bending

concepts.label: Cold
concepts.definition: Common viral infection affecting nose and throat

concepts.label: Fever
concepts.definition: Elevated body temperature often indicating infection

concepts.label: Cough
concepts.definition: Sudden expulsion of air from lungs to clear airways

concepts.label: Headache
concepts.definition: Pain in head or upper neck area

concepts.label: Wound
concepts.definition: Injury to body tissue caused by physical damage

concepts.label: Bandage
concepts.definition: Strip of material used to cover and protect wounds

concepts.label: Medicine
concepts.definition: Substance used to treat, cure, or prevent disease

concepts.label: Doctor
concepts.definition: Medical professional who diagnoses and treats patients

concepts.label: Hospital
concepts.definition: Healthcare institution providing medical treatment

concepts.label: Vaccination
concepts.definition: Administration of vaccine to stimulate immune response

concepts.label: Allergy
concepts.definition: Immune system reaction to normally harmless substance

concepts.label: Sleep
concepts.definition: Natural state of rest with reduced consciousness and activity

concepts.label: Exercise
concepts.definition: Physical activity performed to improve health and fitness

concepts.label: Hygiene
concepts.definition: Practices for maintaining health and preventing disease

concepts.label: Pain
concepts.definition: Unpleasant sensory experience indicating injury or illness

concepts.label: Infection
concepts.definition: Invasion and multiplication of microorganisms in body

concepts.label: Antibiotic
concepts.definition: Medicine that kills or inhibits growth of bacteria

concepts.label: Vitamin C
concepts.definition: Essential nutrient that supports immune system and tissue repair

concepts.label: Calcium
concepts.definition: Mineral essential for bone and tooth health

concepts.label: Iron
concepts.definition: Mineral essential for blood production and oxygen transport

concepts.label: Nuts
concepts.definition: Hard-shelled fruits containing edible kernels high in healthy fats

concepts.label: Almond
concepts.definition: Oval nut rich in vitamin E and healthy monounsaturated fats

concepts.label: Walnut
concepts.definition: Wrinkled nut high in omega-3 fatty acids

concepts.label: Peanut
concepts.definition: Legume commonly eaten as nut, high in protein

concepts.label: Cashew
concepts.definition: Curved nut with creamy texture and mild flavor

concepts.label: Pistachio
concepts.definition: Small green nut with split shell, high in protein

concepts.label: Spice
concepts.definition: Aromatic substance used to flavor food

concepts.label: Black Pepper
concepts.definition: Spice from peppercorns with sharp, hot flavor

concepts.label: Cinnamon
concepts.definition: Sweet spice from tree bark, used in baking

concepts.label: Ginger
concepts.definition: Spicy root used fresh or dried for flavoring

concepts.label: Turmeric
concepts.definition: Yellow spice with anti-inflammatory properties

concepts.label: Basil
concepts.definition: Aromatic herb commonly used in Italian cooking

concepts.label: Oregano
concepts.definition: Herb with strong flavor used in Mediterranean dishes

concepts.label: Parsley
concepts.definition: Green herb used as garnish and flavoring

concepts.label: Thyme
concepts.definition: Small-leaved herb with earthy flavor

concepts.label: Rosemary
concepts.definition: Needle-like herb with pine-like aroma

concepts.label: Cooking
concepts.definition: Process of preparing food by applying heat

concepts.label: Baking
concepts.definition: Cooking method using dry heat in oven

concepts.label: Frying
concepts.definition: Cooking method using hot oil or fat

concepts.label: Boiling
concepts.definition: Cooking method using water at 100 degrees Celsius

concepts.label: Grilling
concepts.definition: Cooking method using direct heat from below

concepts.label: Steaming
concepts.definition: Cooking method using water vapor

concepts.label: Roasting
concepts.definition: Cooking method using dry heat in oven at high temperature

concepts.label: Recipe
concepts.definition: Set of instructions for preparing a particular dish

concepts.label: Ingredient
concepts.definition: Component used in cooking or baking

concepts.label: Kitchen
concepts.definition: Room equipped for preparing and cooking food

concepts.label: Oven
concepts.definition: Enclosed compartment for baking or roasting food

concepts.label: Stove
concepts.definition: Cooking appliance with burners for heating pots and pans

concepts.label: Refrigerator
concepts.definition: Appliance for keeping food cold and fresh

concepts.label: Microwave
concepts.definition: Appliance that heats food using electromagnetic radiation

concepts.label: Breakfast
concepts.definition: First meal of the day, typically eaten in morning

concepts.label: Lunch
concepts.definition: Meal eaten in middle of day

concepts.label: Dinner
concepts.definition: Main meal of day, typically eaten in evening

concepts.label: Snack
concepts.definition: Small amount of food eaten between meals

concepts.label: Sweet
concepts.definition: Taste characteristic of sugar and honey

concepts.label: Sour
concepts.definition: Sharp acid taste like lemon or vinegar

concepts.label: Bitter
concepts.definition: Sharp unpleasant taste like coffee or dark chocolate

concepts.label: Salty
concepts.definition: Taste characteristic of salt

concepts.label: Umami
concepts.definition: Savory taste found in meat, cheese, and mushrooms

concepts.label: Digestion
concepts.definition: Process of breaking down food into nutrients

concepts.label: Metabolism
concepts.definition: Chemical processes that maintain life in organisms

concepts.label: Energy
concepts.definition: Power needed by body to function and move

concepts.label: Appetite
concepts.definition: Natural desire to eat food

concepts.label: Hunger
concepts.definition: Physical sensation of needing food

concepts.label: Thirst
concepts.definition: Physical sensation of needing liquid

concepts.label: Healthy
concepts.definition: State of being in good physical and mental condition

concepts.label: Unhealthy
concepts.definition: State of poor physical or mental condition

concepts.label: Nutritious
concepts.definition: Containing substances necessary for health and growth

concepts.label: Organic
concepts.definition: Food produced without synthetic pesticides or fertilizers

concepts.label: Fresh
concepts.definition: Recently produced or harvested, not preserved

concepts.label: Frozen
concepts.definition: Preserved at very low temperature to prevent spoilage

concepts.label: Canned
concepts.definition: Preserved in sealed container for long storage

concepts.label: Restaurant
concepts.definition: Business that prepares and serves food to customers

concepts.label: Menu
concepts.definition: List of food and drink items available at restaurant

concepts.label: Chef
concepts.definition: Professional cook who manages kitchen operations

concepts.label: Waiter
concepts.definition: Person who serves food and drinks in restaurant

concepts.label: Dessert
concepts.definition: Sweet course typically eaten at end of meal

concepts.label: Cake
concepts.definition: Sweet baked dessert made with flour, sugar, and eggs

concepts.label: Cookie
concepts.definition: Small flat sweet baked treat

concepts.label: Ice Cream
concepts.definition: Frozen dessert made from dairy products and sugar

concepts.label: Chocolate
concepts.definition: Sweet food made from cacao beans

concepts.label: Candy
concepts.definition: Sweet confection made primarily from sugar

concepts.label: Soup
concepts.definition: Liquid dish combining water or stock with vegetables, meat, or legumes

concepts.label: Salad
concepts.definition: Dish of mixed raw vegetables typically served with dressing

concepts.label: Sandwich
concepts.definition: Food consisting of ingredients between pieces of bread

concepts.label: Pizza
concepts.definition: Flat bread topped with sauce, cheese, and other ingredients

concepts.label: Burger
concepts.definition: Sandwich consisting of ground meat patty in a bun

concepts.label: Alcohol
concepts.definition: Intoxicating substance found in fermented beverages

concepts.label: Caffeine
concepts.definition: Stimulant compound found in coffee, tea, and some sodas

concepts.label: Antioxidant
concepts.definition: Substance that may prevent damage from free radicals

concepts.label: Bean
concepts.definition: Edible seed of leguminous plants, high in protein

concepts.label: Lentil
concepts.definition: Small lens-shaped legume high in protein and fiber

concepts.label: Chickpea
concepts.definition: Round legume used in hummus and many cuisines

concepts.label: Mushroom
concepts.definition: Fungus with umbrella-shaped fruiting body, used as vegetable

concepts.label: Herb
concepts.definition: Plant valued for medicinal or culinary properties

concepts.label: Seed
concepts.definition: Plant embryo capable of developing into new plant

concepts.label: Weight
concepts.definition: Measure of how heavy someone or something is

concepts.label: Height
concepts.definition: Measurement of how tall someone or something is

concepts.label: Temperature
concepts.definition: Degree of heat present in body or environment

concepts.label: Pulse
concepts.definition: Rhythmic beating of arteries as blood flows through them

concepts.label: Blood Pressure
concepts.definition: Force of blood pushing against artery walls

concepts.label: Disease
concepts.definition: Disorder of structure or function affecting living organisms

concepts.label: Symptom
concepts.definition: Physical or mental sign of illness or condition

concepts.label: Treatment
concepts.definition: Medical care given to cure or relieve illness

concepts.label: Recovery
concepts.definition: Process of getting better from illness or injury

concepts.label: Prevention
concepts.definition: Action taken to stop something from happening

concepts.label: Immune System
concepts.definition: Body's defense system against infections and diseases

concepts.label: White Blood Cell
concepts.definition: Blood cell that fights infection and disease

concepts.label: Red Blood Cell
concepts.definition: Blood cell that carries oxygen from lungs to body tissues

concepts.label: Platelet
concepts.definition: Blood cell fragment that helps blood clotting

concepts.label: Joint
concepts.definition: Place where two bones meet and allow movement

concepts.label: Cartilage
concepts.definition: Flexible tissue that cushions joints and shapes body parts

concepts.label: Tendon
concepts.definition: Tough tissue connecting muscle to bone

concepts.label: Ligament
concepts.definition: Tough tissue connecting bone to bone

concepts.label: Hormone
concepts.definition: Chemical messenger produced by glands to regulate body functions

concepts.label: Insulin
concepts.definition: Hormone that regulates blood sugar levels

concepts.label: Adrenaline
concepts.definition: Hormone released during stress or excitement

concepts.label: Pregnancy
concepts.definition: Condition of carrying developing offspring within body

concepts.label: Birth
concepts.definition: Act of bringing forth offspring from body

concepts.label: Growth
concepts.definition: Process of increasing in size or developing

concepts.label: Aging
concepts.definition: Process of growing older and body changes over time

concepts.label: Stress
concepts.definition: Physical or mental tension caused by demanding circumstances

concepts.label: Relaxation
concepts.definition: State of being free from tension and anxiety

concepts.label: Mental Health
concepts.definition: State of psychological and emotional well-being

concepts.label: Physical Fitness
concepts.definition: State of health allowing daily activities without undue fatigue

concepts.label: Dairy
concepts.definition: Food products made from milk of mammals

concepts.label: Cream
concepts.definition: Thick white liquid separated from milk, high in fat

concepts.label: Cottage Cheese
concepts.definition: Soft white cheese made from curds of milk

concepts.label: Mozzarella
concepts.definition: Mild white cheese originally from Italy

concepts.label: Cheddar
concepts.definition: Hard yellow cheese with sharp flavor

concepts.label: Parmesan
concepts.definition: Hard Italian cheese with strong flavor, often grated

concepts.label: Seafood
concepts.definition: Edible marine life including fish and shellfish

concepts.label: Oyster
concepts.definition: Bivalve mollusk often eaten raw as delicacy

concepts.label: Clam
concepts.definition: Bivalve mollusk with two shells hinged together

concepts.label: Mussel
concepts.definition: Bivalve mollusk with dark elongated shell

concepts.label: Scallop
concepts.definition: Bivalve mollusk with fan-shaped shell and sweet meat

concepts.label: Grain
concepts.definition: Small hard edible seed of cereal plants

concepts.label: Whole Grain
concepts.definition: Grain containing entire kernel including bran and germ

concepts.label: Refined Grain
concepts.definition: Grain with bran and germ removed during processing

concepts.label: Tofu
concepts.definition: Protein-rich food made from coagulated soy milk

concepts.label: Tempeh
concepts.definition: Fermented soy product with nutty flavor and firm texture

concepts.label: Seitan
concepts.definition: Protein-rich food made from wheat gluten

concepts.label: Olive Oil
concepts.definition: Oil extracted from olives, used in cooking and dressings

concepts.label: Coconut Oil
concepts.definition: Oil extracted from coconut meat, solid at room temperature

concepts.label: Vegetable Oil
concepts.definition: Oil extracted from various plants used for cooking

concepts.label: Honey
concepts.definition: Sweet substance made by bees from flower nectar

concepts.label: Maple Syrup
concepts.definition: Sweet syrup made from sap of maple trees

concepts.label: Molasses
concepts.definition: Thick brown syrup from sugar refining process

concepts.label: Pickle
concepts.definition: Vegetable preserved in vinegar or salt brine

concepts.label: Jerky
concepts.definition: Dried meat preserved by removing moisture

concepts.label: Jam
concepts.definition: Sweet spread made from fruit and sugar

concepts.label: Grapefruit
concepts.definition: Large citrus fruit with bitter-sweet taste

concepts.label: Lime
concepts.definition: Small green citrus fruit with very sour taste

concepts.label: Cranberry
concepts.definition: Small red berry with tart flavor, often dried or juiced

concepts.label: Fig
concepts.definition: Sweet soft fruit with many tiny seeds inside

concepts.label: Date
concepts.definition: Sweet dried fruit from date palm tree

concepts.label: Asparagus
concepts.definition: Green spear-shaped vegetable with distinctive flavor

concepts.label: Artichoke
concepts.definition: Large flower bud vegetable with edible heart

concepts.label: Brussels Sprout
concepts.definition: Small round green vegetable resembling tiny cabbage

concepts.label: Leek
concepts.definition: Vegetable in onion family with long white stem and green leaves

concepts.label: Turnip
concepts.definition: White root vegetable with purple top
